summary: Matched and improved several remaining ground/stage routines across Greens, Pura, and Push On. The PR added real C for Pura background/camera-subject logic, Push On light-selection and region-check logic, and several Greens block/bomb matching rewrites, plus header/type cleanup and a data-symbol split. decomp.dev reported +1960 matched code bytes, +32 matched data bytes, 8 new matches, 17 unmatched-item improvements, and 2 small Greens regressions.

key_files.why: Largest Pura decomp work: implemented or improved grPura_802120E0, grPura_8021231C, grPura_80212CD4, grPura_80212EF4, grPura_80212FC0, grPura_80213030, grPura_80213250, and matching details in grPura_80211D00/grPura_802125F0.
Added grPushOn_80218888 lighting behavior and fully matched fn_802192A4 according to the bot report.
Reworked Greens data arrays, block indexing, bomb initialization, block swapping, row weight mapping, and callback index use.
Replaced UNK_RET prototypes with void where known and introduced typed GrPuVtxMapEntry for grPu_803E6C0C.
Typed fn_802192A4 as s32 fn_802192A4(void*, HSD_GObj*, s32*).
Corrected grPura_GroundVars field types and added grPura_GroundVars3 with HSD_JObj* and CmSubject* arrays.
Split grGr_803E787C from one 0xC4 data object into a 0x3C object plus new grGr_803E78B8 at 0x803E78B8.

what_changed: Pura: grPura_80211D00 now uses inline 0.8f camera-bound scaling expressions instead of separate grPu_804DBA58/grPu_804DBA5C constants, with UNUSED locals for matching.

Pura: added grPura_802120E0, which interpolates between entries in grPu_803E6AA0 over 3600.0f frames, updates Ground_801C205C and Camera_SetBackgroundColor, then picks a new random color index with HSD_Randi(4).

Pura: grPura_8021231C now uses stack Vec3/Quaternion locals and GET_JOBJ to copy translation, rotation, scale, and hidden flags from gp->gv.pura2.xC8 to the stage JObj; bot reported this reached 100%.

Pura: grPura_80212CD4 initializes 25 stored JObjs and 25 CmSubject pointers, obtains Camera_80029020 subjects, copies node positions via lb_8000B1CC, mirrors hidden state, and sets subject bounds using 30.0f/-30.0f.
Pura: grPura_80212EF4 updates the 25 stored camera subjects from their JObjs each frame; bot reported this reached 100%.
Pura: grPura_80212FC0 and grPura_80213030 were rewritten from raw u16 pointer/M2C_FIELD access to typed grPu_803E6C0C GrPuVtxMapEntry indexing.
Pura: grPura_80213250 was rewritten as a recursive JObj/DObj traversal using union_type_dobj, DObj iteration, grPura_80213128, grPura_80213224, and HSD_MObjCompileTev.

Push On: grPushOn_80218888 now computes fighter-relative distances to light objects, selection-sorts light indices by distance, hides all but the nearest five, and updates point_light/spot_light position, interest, color, and flags.

Push On: fn_802192A4 now has a typed implementation that checks a fighter position against four scaled rectangular regions from grPushOn_803E7CCC and writes grPushOn_804D6AB8->x0 to the result on hit.
Greens: added static s16 grGr_803E787C[30] and changed grGreens_80214FA8 to use it for mpJointSetCb2 while retaining grGr_803E7840 for Ground_801C3FA4 lookups.
Greens: getBlock now casts x8_blocks to a 2D [6] array, and callers in grGreens_802159B8/grGreens_80215D54 were rewritten around row/column access rather than manual byte-like offsets.
Greens: grGreens_80214B58 replaced memset/static-index-loop code with an explicit zero loop plus repeated inline BOMB calls, improving the function to 99.26% per the bot.
Greens: grGreens_802166C4 row weight mapping was reordered so row 0 uses x18, row 1 uses x14, row 2 uses x10, row 3 uses xC, and row 4 uses x8_blockBombChance.

Headers/types: grPura prototypes for grPura_80212CD4, grPura_80212EF4, and grPura_80213250 changed from UNK_RET to void; fn_802192A4 received real parameter/return types; grPura_GroundVars changed xC4/xC8 to s16 fields and added grPura_GroundVars3.
smart_moves: Split the Greens data symbol in symbols.txt before adding the new grGr_803E787C array, preventing one oversized object from obscuring separate data boundaries.
Used a pointer-to-array cast in getBlock to express Greens block storage as rows of 6, which made later block-swapping code more semantic and reduced fragile offset arithmetic.
Introduced GrPuVtxMapEntry for grPu_803E6C0C, replacing M2C_FIELD/raw u16 stepping with named fields while also enabling small Pura functions to fully match.
Used deliberately shaped helpers and wrappers for codegen: inline BOMB with unrolled calls in Greens, and grPura_80211E08_noinline/noinline2 wrappers in Pura.

Kept exact matching details where cleaner C would differ: explicit float literals such as 3.4028235e38f, 0.8f, and 3600.0f, UNUSED locals, PAD_STACK, HSD_ASSERT line numbers, and stepwise flag assignments.
Moved from guessed pointer locals to real stack Vec3/Quaternion temporaries in grPura_8021231C, matching HSD_JObjGet/Set API usage and reaching 100%.
decomp_lessons: When a flat array is really a grid, a pointer-to-array cast can recover source-like indexing and improve both readability and matching without changing the stored layout.
Do not leave data symbols oversized when adjacent arrays become known; split symbols.txt entries to match true object boundaries and help .data progress.
Replacing M2C_FIELD tables with a small typed struct can immediately clarify loop stride, field signedness, and pointer slots.
For matching, source-like compact loops are not always best: unrolled calls, explicit zeroing loops, selection-sort shape, and wrapper calls may better reproduce original codegen.
Exact float constant spelling can matter. This PR used literals rather than F32_MAX or named sdata constants where that matched better.
Camera/stage object code often needs the right external types in headers; adding CmSubject to Ground vars made Pura camera-subject logic expressible.
Header return types should be updated as functions become known; moving from UNK_RET to void/s32 reduces ambiguity for future callers and match attempts.
Small accepted regressions can appear while improving larger functions; this slice records Greens regressions in grGreens_80215ED8 and fn_80215B84 that future work should revisit.
naming_conventions: Ground stage files retain prefix conventions: grGr_* for Greens data, grPu_* for Pura data, grPura_* and grPushOn_* for functions.
Unknown-but-offset-stable fields remain xNN-style, e.g. gp->gv.pura.xC4/xC6/xC8, gp->gv.pura3.xC4/x128, and GrPuVtxMapEntry x00/x02/x04/x06/x08.
The new typed table name GrPuVtxMapEntry documents Pura vertex/JObj mapping while preserving offset field names.
Temporary matching wrappers were named grPura_80211E08_noinline and grPura_80211E08_noinline2, explicitly signaling codegen intent rather than game semantics.
The inline Greens helper BOMB is uppercase and macro-like, matching its repeated call-site usage in grGreens_80214B58.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use inline helper plus explicit repeated calls when an original sequence does not compile like an array loop; applied to BOMB(0x12), BOMB(0x0C), etc. in grGreens_80214B58.
Use noinline wrapper chains to force an extra call shape; applied in grPura_802125F0 by calling grPura_80211E08_noinline2(1).
Use PAD_STACK and UNUSED locals when stack layout/register pressure is part of the match; present in grPura_802120E0 and grPura_80211D00.
Prefer exact float literals over macros or named constants where needed for rodata/sdata/codegen, e.g. 3.4028235e38f instead of F32_MAX.
Preserve signed casts for color interpolation and comparisons, such as casting GXColor channels through u8/s8 and gp->gv.pura.xC8 through s16.
Reproduce simple selection-sort ordering for arrays of indices/distances in grPushOn_80218888 rather than using library sort or cleaner abstractions.
Use explicit HSD_LObj flag set/clear and multi-step bit operations to match original light-object codegen.
Replace __assert calls with HSD_ASSERT when line-numbered project macros match the generated assertion shape.

review_feedback.details: Reported GALE01 matched code 69.18% (+0.05%, +1960 bytes) and matched data 41.19% (+0.00%, +32 bytes).
8 new matches: fn_802192A4, grPura_80212EF4, grPura_8021231C, fn_80216DE4, grpura .sdata, grPura_80212FC0, grPura_80213030, and grPura_80211D00.
2 reported unmatched-item regressions: grGreens_80215ED8 (-12 bytes) and fn_80215B84 (-6 bytes).
No PR body, human review comments, or reviews were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: grGreens_80215ED8 regression after grGreens block grid rewrite
replace xC4 xC8 names in grPura_GroundVars when semantics known
